prose: The Fukui reactivity analysis was performed using the chemkit `fukui-reactivity` skill with the DFT method at the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase. The result indicates the most electrophilic atom in acrolein has Fukui plus value approximately 0.39762, and the most nucleophilic atom has Fukui minus value approximately 0.39389.
